nodes.body: <<FILL role=ending words=132 beats='the year the truth set the realm alight; Vantrain sellsword letter loosed to every street, the Commodore exposed and the country at open war over it, the river folk ground first between Slate and Copper; you loosed a real truth and it could not be recalled, exactly as the rule warned, and the commons paid the price of the daylight'>>

ending.title: The Truth That Lit the War

nodes.body: <<FILL role=consequence words=148 beats='you loose it only to the houses, a proof laid before Slate and Copper and the Council behind closed doors; Vantrain cannot deny his own seal and cannot afford it public, and the Slate house holds the same knife; the Commodore is shamed and leashed without a crier ever shouting'>>

choices.label: Show the letter to the banners alone.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=ending words=130 beats='the year Verdant shamed a duke in the dark; the sellsword letter shown only to the banners, Vantrain leashed by his own seal without a public fire, the war kept off the commons; you learned the difference between a truth thrown and a truth spent, and spent this one so the river country would not have to burn to be believed'>>

ending.title: The Letter Shown Behind Closed Doors

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=148 beats='you hold the letter and let its weight do the work; Factor Oyelaran carries the leverage no other house has to the Council table, the one proof that can bind Vantrain, and asks in return the thing Verdant wanted all year; the boy-king warded by a Council, the commons seated, the war unfought; the last Verdant choice is what to buy with the leverage'>>

choices.label: Trade on the truth instead of loosing it.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=154 beats='the leverage of Vantrain letter in hand and a whole year to close; spend it to convene the Council of Banners at the fords, binding every house and seating the commons at last; or spend it narrower and surer, trading the letter directly for Prince Petra safety into a shared keeping; the wide win or the sure one, the Council or the child, and Verdant cannot buy both with one page'>>

choices.label: Convene the Council of Banners at the fords.
Trade the letter for the prince safety.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=consequence words=150 beats='you call the Council to the very fords that drowned in the spring, and the leverage of the letter holds every house to the table; Slate bound by the bridge-proof, Copper bound by the sellsword letter, Verdant holding both'>>

choices.label: Convene the banners where the fords drowned.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=consequence words=146 beats='the Council of Banners made real at last, the commons seated, the boy-king its ward, the reforms of a whole year written into law on the bank of a grave; no single banner able to break what all of them signed'>>

choices.label: Bind every banner to one table.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=consequence words=142 beats='the great houses leashed to one another and to the commons, the boy-king warded by all and grasped by none, the war folded before it opened; Factor Oyelaran spent one page to buy the thing Verdant never had'>>

choices.label: Write the year into a new shape.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=consequence words=140 beats='a permanent seat and a Council no single banner can break; you kept the chancery rule to the end, proof and patience over the sword, and turned a single letter into the shape of the realm to come'>>

choices.label: Read the whole cause into the record.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=consequence words=138 beats='the crossing rebuilt where the flood took it, the Council meeting on the very ground that was a grave; you learn that the deepest wins are built on the deepest griefs, and you helped build this one honestly'>>

choices.label: Stand on the mended fords at winter.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=ending words=138 beats='the year Verdant built the Council on a grave; Vantrain letter spent to bind every house to the table at the drowned fords, Slate leashed by the bridge and Copper by the sellswords, the commons seated at last and the boy-king warded by all; you won the whole Verdant cause with one page and no war, proof and patience over the sword, the year written into law'>>

ending.title: The Council Convened at the Fenwick Span

nodes.body: <<FILL role=consequence words=150 beats='you spend the letter not on the Council but on the boy; the leverage traded straight across for Prince Petra passed out of every grasping hand into a shared, guarded keeping; Verdant gives up the wider win and takes the surer one'>>

choices.label: Trade a page for a child safety.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=consequence words=144 beats='a child safe now rather than a cause won maybe; Factor Oyelaran signs it without regret, because the commons taught her which lives count first, and a boy off the board is worth more than a clause on a page'>>

choices.label: Choose the certain life over the maybe.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=consequence words=140 beats='Petra out of Ember Station and every trap, warded and breathing, the wider Council let go for another year; you learn that Verdant highest law was never the seat but the life, and you kept it'>>

choices.label: Close the year with a king kept safe.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=ending words=132 beats='the year Verdant spent its one card on a child; Vantrain letter traded straight for Prince Petra safety into shared keeping, the wider Council let go for the surer rescue, the boy out of every grasping hand at last; you chose the certain life over the possible cause and closed the year with a king safe, the chancery rule kept in mercy again'>>

ending.title: The Page Traded for the Child
